rulings.Rulings: TENTATIVE RULING: BANK OF THE WEST - O/C, DEFT DISMISSED. SCOTT COMPANY - O/C, DEFT DISMISSED. RE STANFORD - GRANT, NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE CONTROL, EXPOSURE BY DEFENDANT'S PERSONNEL, OR NEGLIGENT HIRING. RE NATIONAL SEMICONDUCTOR - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED BURDEN SHIFTS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO RAISE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE BY DEFENDANT PERSONNEL, EXERCISE OF CONTROL OR NEGLIGENT HIRING. REQUEST FOR 437C(H) CONTINUANCE DENIED.
RE PARKER - DENY, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. SPECIFICALLY, DEFENDANT NEGLECTED TO ATTACH INTERROGATORIES OR ADDRESS MARKET SHARE OR MISREPRESENTATION THEORIES OF LIABILITY.
RE PARKER - DENY, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. SPECIFICALLY, DEFENDANT NEGLECTED TO ATTACH INTERROGATORIES OR ADDRESS MARKET SHARE OR MISREPRESENTATION THEORIES OF LIABILITY.
RE SLAYEN - DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE/CAUSATION. SEE DECLARATIONS OF HOPSTER AND COHEN.
RE HILL BROS. - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: FISCAL FUNDING CO INC VS BRANDFORD
rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 11/14/01: MOVING PARTY TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE.

rulings.Case Title: THIRLWALL VS OCWEN FEDERAL BANK FSB
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE. OVERRULED IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS. MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES DENIED.
SUSTAIN DEMURRER BREACH OF EXPRESS CONTRACT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRULE DEMURRER AS TO BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING. DENY MOTION TO STRIKE.

rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW VS ADG CONCERNS INC.
